pass1_value.note: Official docs describe two primary auth methods: OAuth 2.0 for apps and Store API Accounts which provide client_id and access token headers (X-Auth-Client, X-Auth-Token) for API calls — mapped here to 'oauth2' and to 'api_key'/'token' respectively.

final_value.note: Official docs describe two primary ways to authenticate: (1) OAuth 2.0 for apps (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/docs/start/authentication/oauth2) and (2) Store API Accounts (API Accounts) created in a store control panel, which generate a Client ID and Access Token used as headers X-Auth-Client and X-Auth-Token. Mapped here to oauth2 and to api_key/token respectively.

pass1_value.note: Developer Guide shows registering as a developer and creating apps; testing/installing apps requires a BigCommerce store and the docs reference using a trial store for testing (i.e., API credentials can be obtained by a developer using a store/trial control panel).

final_value.note: Getting Started guide lists prerequisites including a BigCommerce store and explicitly notes you can use a trial store for development/testing; it also describes creating an app in the Developer Portal to obtain Client ID/Client Secret and installing it to receive an OAuth access token.

pass1_value.note: Public API reference and developer guides exist and API credentials can be created from a store control panel (trial available). You need a BigCommerce store (trial suffices) to create Store API Accounts or to install and test OAuth apps.

final_value.note: Public API reference is available (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/api-reference). Official authentication docs show self-serve credential paths: OAuth 2.0 for apps (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/docs/start/authentication/oauth2) and Store API Accounts created in a store control panel that generate Client ID and Access Token for X-Auth-Client/X-Auth-Token headers (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/docs/start/authentication/api-accounts). Getting started guide indicates you can use a trial store for development/testing (https://developer.bigcommerce.com/apps/guide/getting-started).
